name: Lofty (Chime) Real Estate CRM API
what_it_does: Lofty (formerly Chime Technologies) REST API for AI-powered real estate CRM, IDX websites, and lead conversion automation. Enables AI agents to manage AI-driven lead scoring and prioritization for real estate agent productivity, handle automated lead nurture and intelligent follow-up sequence for buyer and seller conversion, access IDX property search integration and listing management for consumer-facing real estate search, retrieve team and brokerage performance analytics for real estate operations management, manage smart plans and behavioral trigger automation for real estate marketing, handle showing management and appointment scheduling for buyer workflow, access listing presentation and market analysis tools for seller lead conversion, retrieve integration with MLS, portals, and transaction management, manage geographic farming and circle prospecting for seller lead generation, and automate open house lead capture and follow-up for event-driven lead management.
use_cases: AI-powered lead scoring from real estate productivity agents
Automating smart follow-up from lead conversion agents
Managing IDX lead capture from real estate website agents
Tracking team performance from brokerage analytics agents
not_for: Commercial real estate without residential focus
Luxury single-agent teams without technology-driven lead generation
best_when: A real estate team or brokerage using Lofty (Chime) wants AI agents to enhance lead scoring, follow-up automation, team performance management, and IDX-driven lead conversion.
avoid_when: NAR SETTLEMENT RISK: Post-2024 NAR settlement buyer agency compensation disclosure requirements must be integrated into automated buyer lead intake. TCPA — Lofty automated calling and SMS campaigns require prior express written consent; AI-powered dialer automation to unconsented leads creates TCPA liability. Fair Housing Act compliance — AI lead scoring and routing must not produce disparate impact by race, religion, national origin, or other protected class; automated geographic routing with demographic correlation creates Fair Housing Act exposure.

auth.notes: Lofty uses OAuth 2.0 and API key authentication. REST API with JSON. API access via Lofty partner program. Webhooks for CRM events. Scottsdale, Arizona HQ (Lofty). Founded 2016 as Chime Technologies. Rebranded to Lofty 2023. Private (ICONIQ Capital, Andreessen Horowitz). 100,000+ real estate professional users. AI-first real estate CRM. Competes with kvCORE, Follow Up Boss, and BoomTown for real estate team CRM.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-agent monthly subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-agent monthly subscription; team and brokerage plans
pricing.notes: Scottsdale, AZ. Founded 2016. ICONIQ/a16z-backed. Rebranded from Chime to Lofty 2023. 100,000+ users. AI-first real estate CRM. Competes with kvCORE and Follow Up Boss.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented per partner integration

known_agent_gotchas: FAIR HOUSING ACT RISK: AI lead scoring and geographic routing must not produce disparate impact by protected class; automated routing correlated with neighborhood demographics creates Fair Housing Act exposure and HUD complaint risk
NAR SETTLEMENT COMPLIANCE: Post-2024 NAR settlement requires buyer agency compensation disclosure in automated buyer intake; non-compliant automation creates NAR ethics exposure

TCPA AI dialer compliance — Lofty AI-powered calling features require prior express written consent for autodialed calls; AI agents triggering automated calls to unconsented leads creates TCPA class action liability
Brand confusion risk — Chime-to-Lofty rebrand (2023) may cause integration documentation gaps; verify API endpoint stability post-rebrand
MLS IDX data use restrictions — IDX property search data has strict display and portability rules; automated lead enrichment using IDX data must comply with MLS member rules
Partner-only API — Lofty API access requires partner program enrollment; integration scope may be limited compared to direct platform features
agent_readiness.security_notes: AI real estate CRM. SOC2. OAuth2/API key. US. Lead and agent data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Real estate AI CRM. SOC2. OAuth2. US. Lead and agent performance data.
